steps.title: Spot the specific examples
steps.content: The second sentence names exact mushroom species and the specific compounds Ferreira detected in each—concrete instances of the phenolic compounds mentioned in the first sentence.

steps.title: Apply the correct transition
steps.content: ”For example” introduces specific instances that illustrate a general claim. The other three choices falsely imply different logical relationships: “However” and “Nevertheless” suggest contradiction, while “For this reason” implies causation—neither fits the exemplification pattern here. That matches choice C — C is correct.
